Ismail al-Jazari

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Al-Jazari Automata
by Ismail al-Jazari
Artuqid · 1206 · Upper Mesopotamia
An illustrated manuscript of ingenious devices — water clocks, a peacock hand-washer, a drinking elephant clock with automata on its howdah. Al-Jazari's engineering drawings are as clear as modern blueprints.
←Ibn al-Bawwab Sultan 'Ali al-Mashadi→
